## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `xcodegen generate` after changing `project.yml`.
- [ ] I ran `xcodebuild test -scheme StarMagpie -destination 'platform=macOS'`.
- [ ] I updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated both English and Simplified Chinese localization files for user-facing text.
- [ ] I updated README or related docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not log or persist GitHub tokens outside Keychain.
